name: Kalmar County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the gold quarters, lions and star
the blue quarters of the arms

description: A banner of the quartered arms of Kalmar County — blue and gold quarters with crowned heraldic lions — bearing a central red escutcheon charged with a gold six-pointed star, the historic emblem of Kalmar.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Kalmar County, derived from the medieval arms of the city of Kalmar combined with elements from the historic province of Smaland.

features.symbolism: a gold six-pointed star, the historic emblem of Kalmar from the city's medieval arms
